query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS matchmaking_queue (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  playerId INT NOT NULL,
  gameId INT NOT NULL,
  matchType ENUM('casual', 'ranked', 'tournament') DEFAULT 'casual' NOT NULL,
  playerRating INT DEFAULT 1000,
  ratingRange INT DEFAULT 200,
  queuedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('waiting', 'matched', 'expired', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'waiting' NOT NULL,
  matchedWithId INT,
  matchedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX idx_game (gameId),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

  matchType ENUM('casual', 'ranked', 'tournament') DEFAULT 'casual' NOT NULL,

  matchedWithId INT,

);
